---
title: "Test"
subtitle: "Assess and remove low-quality cells before downstream analysis"
author: "Sarintip"
categories: [scRNA-seq, Seurat, QC]
date: "2024-10-06"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true   # Enables folding for code chunks
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: true
    toc: true         # Adds a table of contents
    toc-depth: 4    # Set depth to 4 (includes H1 to H4)
---

![Pipeline](Test.svg){width="100%"}

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| eval: true
#| code-fold: false
#| warning: false
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

## Scatter Plot

```{r}
#| label: scatter
#| fig-cap: "Simulated UMAP-like scatter plot"
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5
#| eval: true
#| code-fold: false

set.seed(42)
df <- data.frame(
  UMAP1  = c(rnorm(200, -2), rnorm(200, 2), rnorm(200, 0)),
  UMAP2  = c(rnorm(200, -2), rnorm(200, 2), rnorm(200, 3)),
  cluster = rep(c("T cell", "B cell", "Monocyte"), each = 200)
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Simulated UMAP", color = "Cell Type")
```

## Violin Plot

```{r}
#| label: violin
#| fig-cap: "Gene expression by cluster"
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4

df$expression <- c(
  abs(rnorm(200, 2, 1)),
  abs(rnorm(200, 4, 1)),
  abs(rnorm(200, 1, 0.5))
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = cluster, y = expression, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Expression by Cell Type", 
       x = NULL, y = "Normalized Expression") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## Patchwork — combined plots

```{r}
#| label: combined
#| fig-cap: "Combined layout with patchwork"
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = cluster, y = expression, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p1 | p2
```

## Session Info

```{r}
#| label: session
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
